mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boxes (id, organization_id, name, location, description, qr_code, created_at, updated_at, created_by) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{name}, #{location}, #{description}, #{qrCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} )
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.organization_id, b.name, b.location, b.description, b.created_at, b.updated_at, COUNT(i.id) as item_count, GREATEST(b.updated_at, COALESCE(MAX(i.updated_at), b.updated_at)) as last_updated FROM boxes b LEFT JOIN items i ON b.id = i.box_id WHERE b.organization_id = #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} GROUP BY b.id, b.organization_id, b.name, b.location, b.description, b.created_at, b.updated_at ORDER BY last_updated DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
